sources.headline: Sarajevo Film Festival Unveils Full Competition Lineup
sources.summary: The Sarajevo Film Festival has revealed its full lineup for the 32nd edition of the festival, with a total of 51 films set to screen across its four competition selections – narrative feature film, feature and short documentary film, narrative short film and student short film.
